name_en: Shafaqna Institute for Middle East Studies
description: The Shafaqna Institute for Middle East Studies is a UK-based think tank affiliated with the Shafaqna media network, which takes a Shia-oriented and broadly Tehran-sympathetic editorial position on Middle Eastern affairs. The institute produced analysis on the Yemeni civil war, Gulf politics, and Iranian foreign policy, often framing events in alignment with Iranian state narratives. It provided an institutional platform for analysts publishing in pro-Iran media ecosystems during the 2010s.
editorial_notes: UK-based but Tehran-sympathetic editorial line. Affiliated with Shafaqna media network (shafaqna.com). Not an Iranian state entity but operates within the pro-Iran diaspora media sphere.
